## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and the affected Markdown/storage paths.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] Existing Schema 1 notes remain readable without migration.
- [ ] Invalid, duplicate, future-schema, and stale data fail closed before writing.
- [ ] No account, telemetry, or required network request was added.
- [ ] New UI uses scoped selectors and Obsidian semantic variables.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Relevant manual Obsidian checks, if UI behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots contain no private vault data
